title: MC Classics+
description: MC Classics+ | OG feel | Fun Multiplayer | Nostalgia | Old and New!
body:
![MC Classics+ logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a6d3df1eaed5ca454cf168929a20e9ec602fe20.png)

**This modpack brings back the feeling of old Minecraft Java and transforms it into a new beta/alpha-style experience.** _I’m not sure what to call it exactly, but the nostalgic vibe is definitely there._ It’s the perfect modpack to enjoy with your friends and family. Relive the classic atmosphere with C418’s iconic music note: there's a 1-minute delay before the music starts playing. _**and for multiplayer there is e4mc installed**_, **and it has ModernerBeta Installed for the terrain generation.
